text: including design metal temperatures. iv) Steam pressure at superheater outlet : To correspond to turbine throttle steam pressure of 170 kg/cm 2 (abs) [indicative value:179 kg/cm 2 (abs)]. v) Steam generator control range : 50% TMCR to 100% BMCR. However, the bidder to specify the feasible mill combinations below 60% TMCR. Standard Technical Specification fo r Sub- critical Thermal Powe r Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 2 (Steam Generator and Auxiliaries) 2 - 3 Note: a) Pressure drop in reheater should not exceed 2.5 kg/cm2 under all operating conditions. b) The steam temperatures at superheater and reheater outlet(s) shall be guaranteed to be maintained at +50C of the rated value at all loads within control range, under all operating conditions including HP heaters out of service condition. 2.1.6 Fuels A) Coal i) The plant systems shall be designed considering project specific data 1 on coal quality and ash analysis.
